sourceWarning: Ada's publishes current structured menus and item descriptions, but no complete allergen matrix or cross-contact guide. V means vegetarian and may include egg or dairy; G means gluten free. Neither label is promoted into a positive allergen claim. Positive signals come only from fixed published ingredients, explicitly named species, or mandatory food formats. Optional add-ons and modifier sauces are excluded from fixed item signals. Duplicate meal-period presentations are consolidated; food and desserts precede the retained zero-proof beverages and 0.0 beer, while alcohol-only lists remain outside this allergen-focused catalog.
